Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: English Fish and Chips, Beer-Brined Chicken with Giblet Gravy, Beer-Braised Cabbage and Celery Root, Guinness Ice Cream
Video.title: Cooking with Beer

Video.summary: Pickled Herring Casserole, Smoked Scallop Sandwich, Filet of Sole Escabeche
Video.title: Emeril's Seafood Shack

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus-Cured Salmon, Caramelized Ruby Red Grapefruit Salad, Key Lime Cheesecake
Video.title: Citrus Rules

Video.summary: Hot Cross Buns, Crown Roast of Lamb, Ring of Carrot with Buttered Peas, Mini Bundt Cakes with Peanut Butter Filling and Chocolate Glaze
Video.title: Easter Dinner

Video.summary: Coconut-Orange Syrup Cake with Stewed Mangoes; Cranberry Upside-Down Skillet Corn Cake; Poached Seckel Pears with Walnut Pound Cake; Blue Cheese Ice Cream; Rosemary Caramel Ice Cream
Video.title: Sweet Treats

Video.summary: Artichoke and Crab Beignets with Remoulade Sauce, Herb-Crusted Snapper with Fresh Ratatouille, Oysters Stuffed with Mirliton Dressing and Hollandaise
Video.title: Creole Veggies

Video.summary: For your next get together, make Louisiana bourbon the star ingredient.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: For your next get together, try Emeril's favorite beef recipes with an international twist!
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: For your next get together, make okra the main event.
Video.title: Best Okra in Town

Video.summary: For your next get together, celebrate the creole tomato with some of Emeril's favorite dishes.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Jerusalem Artichoke Salad, Jerusalem Artichoke and Potato Gratin, Batter-Fried Jerusalem Artichoke
Video.title: Jerusalem Artichokes

Video.summary: Plain Yogurt, Almond Yogurt and Coriander Sauce, Blueberry Yogurt Crumble Top Cake
Video.title: Yogurt

Video.summary: Ponchatoula Strawberries, Crawfish Pie, Cochon de Lait, French Fry Po Boy
Video.title: Jazz Fest 2

Video.summary: Asparagus with Orange Butter, Turkey Avocado Salad, Asparagus and Crab Ragout
Video.title: Asparagus

Video.summary: Provencal Fish Stew, Bourride, Cioppino
Video.title: Fish Stews

Video.summary: For a New York style tailgate, indulge in some of New York City's Italian favorites.
Video.title: New York Jets

Video.summary: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.
Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: Win over everyone with Emeril's easy crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: Tailgate Houston-style: grilled jalapeno poppers, chili con queso, and ancho-rubbed flap steak.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts
